name: Chicken Mac Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup elbow macaroni, cooked and drained
6 slices low-fat bacon, cooked and crumbled
2 cups chicken breast halves without skin, cooked and cubed
1/2 cup bell peppers, chopped and cooked
10 3/4 ozs low-fat cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375. Prepare an 8 x 12 inches pan with cooking spray; set aside.
Return hot macaroni to saucepan. Stir in bacon, chicken, onions, and bell peppers. In a mixing bowl, combine cream of mushroom soup, sour cream, mixed vegetables, garlic powder, and 1 cup cheddar cheese. Spoon half the macaroni mixture into prepared pan. Cover with half vegetable mixture. Repeat layers. Bake, covered, for 30 minutes or until heated through. Top with remaining cheddar cheese. Bake, uncovered, 3 more minutes.
